nodes.context: Albanian-American gang active in New York City metro area, involved in extortion, illegal gambling, murder, robbery.
New York Mafia family; had soldier Phil Loscalzo and later Arnold Squitieri as leaders.
New York Mafia family; had gambling operations in Astoria, Queens taken over by Rudaj Organization.
Greek-American crime family; rival of Rudaj Organization.

edges.context: Rudaj Organization had conflict with Gambino family over territory and operations; a meeting at a gas station nearly turned violent.
Rudaj Organization attacked Greek associates of Lucchese family and took over their gambling operations in Astoria, Queens.
Rudaj Organization had trouble with Velentzas family, as noted in the infobox.
